items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Insights on Google-driven bookings', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is met. The prior steps focus on booking processes and member interactions, but none specifically address the collection or reporting of insights related to Google-driven bookings. This indicates a gap in the necessary functionality to fulfill the requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
